description_long: This is a compact, freestanding retail display kiosk with four open green shelves supported by a metallic frame. The kiosk features a prominent printed sign at the top, displaying the 'PROTELIM' brand and automotive imagery, suggesting it is intended for car care products. Both side panels are decorated with bold graphics, including a car illustration, green circular logos, and product branding, enhancing its visual appeal and drawing attention from multiple angles. The structure is mounted on small caster wheels, making it easily movable within urban or commercial environments. The open shelving design allows for easy access to displayed products, while the robust frame ensures stability. The kiosk's overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for placement in garages, sidewalks, or retail spaces.
description: A modern, wheeled retail display kiosk with four green shelves, metallic frame, and bold automotive-themed signage and graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open green shelves, the main 'PROTELIM' sign, and clear product display space.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large side graphic with car imagery and circular logo, as well as the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the open back of the shelves and the supporting frame structure, with less visible signage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring side graphics and the profile of the shelving system.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with brand logo and automotive imagery, placed above the top shelf; additional printed graphics on both side panels.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with extended printed signage, no overhangs or decorative roof elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with bold branding and functional design.
